author: Her

delay_seconds.description: Delay before delivery. Use 1 for immediate notifications.

capabilities.title: Schedule notification
capabilities.usageHint: the user asks Her to remind, notify, nudge, or alert them with a local Mac notification.

capabilities.description: Read a local UTF-8 text file into the conversation after user approval.

path.description: Absolute path, ~/ path, or path relative to the current workspace.

capabilities.title: Read text file
capabilities.usageHint: the user asks you to inspect a local text file path; summarize the intended read before requesting approval.

capabilities.description: Speak text aloud through macOS speech synthesis after user approval.

text.description: Text to speak aloud through macOS speech synthesis.

capabilities.title: Speak aloud

capabilities.description: Inspect a user-imported attachment under .her/attachments, extracting text from UTF-8 and PDF files or metadata from images.

max_chars.description: Maximum extracted text characters to return.

path.description: Stored attachment path from .her/attachments, or a filename inside that directory.

capabilities.title: Inspect attachment

description: Mac-native actions exposed through the same plugin capability contract as external extensions.
name: Native macOS
systemPromptAddendum: Native macOS actions require explicit user approval before side effects or local file access.
